title: Headset connection status change reflected on the Cloud
scenario: Headset connection status (green/red indicator) is not correctly reflected across Cloud pages (Device Users, Mobile user, Inventory, Mobile profile, Device profile) when headset is powered on/off
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
2. Ensure the headset is powered ON and connected to the mobile device via Bluetooth.
3. Navigate to the Home screen and confirm the headset is listed as connected.
4. Log into the Poly Cloud portal (e.g., Poly Lens or Poly+).
5. Go to the Device Users page and observe the status indicator for the headset.
6. Go to the Mobile user page and observe the status indicator for the headset.
7. Go to the Inventory page and observe the status indicator for the headset.
8. Go to the Mobile profile page and observe the status indicator for the headset.
9. Go to the Device profile page and observe the status indicator for the headset.
10. Power OFF the headset by pressing and holding the Power button.
11. Wait for the headset to disconnect from the mobile device.
12. Return to the Poly Cloud portal and refresh each of the following pages: Device Users page, Mobile user page, Inventory page, Mobile profile page, Device profile page.
13. Observe the status indicator for the headset on each page.
expected: When the headset is powered ON and connected, a green status mark should appear on all Cloud pages (Device Users, Mobile user, Inventory, Mobile profile, Device profile). When the headset is powered OFF and disconnected, a red status mark should appear on all those pages.
